name: Brunswick Corporation
description: Brunswick Corporation is a global leader in recreation, specializing in the design, manufacture, and marketing of marine propulsion systems, consumer boats, and parts and accessories for the marine and RV markets. Headquartered in Mettawa, Illinois, the company operates through leading brands such as Mercury Marine, Boston Whaler, Sea Ray, and Lund. Brunswick provides innovative marine solutions, including outboard engines, integrated control systems, and boat club services, serving recreational boaters and commercial operators worldwide.
